title: EVEZ Trajectory Projection
description: Forward-projected system state: entropy, basin, branch instability, negative latency trigger

entropy_current.description: Shannon entropy H(X) of decision type distribution over last 30 records

entropy_basin.description: Predicted entropy at convergence basin (lower = more ordered future)

contradiction_score.description: 0-1: fraction of recent hypothesis pairs that contradict each other

branch_instability.description: 0-1: Hamming-distance proxy between current state vector and predicted settlement vector

basin_distance.description: Scalar: sqrt(entropy_delta^2 + branch_instability^2 + contradiction^2). Threshold=1.4 triggers neg-latency

negative_latency_triggered.description: True when basin_distance > 1.4 AND predicted_basin entropy < current entropy

negative_latency_action.description: The pre-emptive action the system takes to align present to future settlement

phi_trajectory.description: Rolling window of last 12 phi scores — slope indicates growth or decay

learning_rate.description: Measured reduction in prediction uncertainty per 15-min cycle

intelligence_gain_rate.description: learning_rate / policy_review_cadence — when >1.0 system gains intelligence faster than it can decide
